label: Site Name
description: Name of the web site: i.e. Example.com

label: Site Tagline
description: Tagline of the website

label: Show Site Name In Navbar
description: Display the site name (and tagline) next to the logo in the navbar

label: Fixed Navbar
description: Keep the navbar fixed at the top of the viewport while scrolling

label: Site Author
description: The author that will be set in the meta data

label: Site first online date
description: Date when the site went online

label: Site URL
description: URL of the website i.e. https://example.com

label: URL Terms of use
description: URL of the terms of use page i.e. https://example.com/pages/terms-of-use

label: Hosted By URL
description: URL of the hosting company i.e. https://example.com

label: Hosted By Logo
description: Path or URL of the hosting company logo

label: Made By URL
description: URL of the developer/agency i.e. https://example.com

label: Made By Logo
description: Path or URL of the developer/agency logo

label: URL Cookies Policy
description: URL of the cookies policy page i.e. https://example.com/pages/cookies

label: Matomo URL
description: URL of the Matomo instance i.e. https://matomo.example.com

label: Matomo Site ID
description: Matomo site ID (integer)

label: Preconnect URLs
description: External origins to preconnect to (JSON array), i.e. ["https://example.com"]. Useful when credits logos or Matomo are hosted on a third-party domain

label: Backup DB Host
description: MySQL host for backups

label: Backup DB User
description: MySQL user for backups

label: Backup DB Password
description: MySQL password for backups

label: Backup Database
description: Name of the MySQL database to back up

label: Backup Mailto
description: Email address for backup reports and error notifications

label: Contact Email
description: Public contact email address displayed on legal pages

label: Contact Phone
description: Public contact phone number displayed on legal pages

label: Director of Publication
description: Full name of the director of publication (required for legal notice)

label: Director Location
description: City or department where the director of publication resides

label: Site Owner
description: Owner of the website, displayed in the legal notice (HTML allowed)

label: Site Producer
description: Producer / developer of the website displayed in the legal notice (HTML allowed)

label: Site Hosting provider
description: Hosting provider of the website displayed in the legal notice (HTML allowed)

label: Site Other Copyright
description: Other copyright information displayed in the legal notice (HTML allowed, not translated - same value shown regardless of the page language)

label: Site Other Cookies
description: Other cookies information displayed in the legal notice (HTML allowed, not translated - same value shown regardless of the page language)

label: Data Protection Officer (DPO)
description: Full name of the Data Protection Officer, required for privacy policy

label: User Registration Enabled
description: Enable (true) or disable (false) the user registration route

label: User Roles Available
description: Extra roles selectable for users in the backoffice (besides the default ROLE_USER), as a JSON array i.e. ["ROLE_ADMIN","ROLE_EDITOR"]
